about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: ISRA Real Estate — Honest and reliable real estate service in Khirdalan & Baku
about.storyText: ISRA Real Estate is a young and energetic real estate company based in Khirdalan. We were built on the principles of honest information, transparent pricing, and personal attention for every client. Our goal is simple: find you the right property and make the process a comfortable, trustworthy experience.
about.missionText: To serve every client with full transparency and honesty — from the first step to the final signature. The client's interests always come first.
about.val1Desc: We share both the strengths and weaknesses of every property honestly — no misleading.
about.val2Desc: We respect your time — from property search to agreement, fast and efficient.
about.val3Desc: We know Khirdalan and Baku well, and give you the right advice.
about.val4Desc: A unique approach for every client — you are not just a buyer, you are our partner.
